text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of the races we've set our sights on for the
year, the spring Tenno Sho, is about to begin...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
My hobbies include ballroom dancing, ballet,
flower arrangement, and combat sports!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
How lucky you are to be in the presence of Gold
Ship, the refreshing, adorable, and beautiful
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! I shall win with grace, as I always do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know why she's talking like that, but what
matters most is that she can't wait to get started,
and that's a great sign!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Let us have a good race, Golshi.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, there you are! I had a feeling you'd be here
when I heard I'd have to go up against a tough
opponent!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not gonna go easy on you. Oh no. Today,
I'm gonna really lay it on ya. Like, just go
straight-up bonkers until—

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What I mean to say is that I'll be leaving you in
the dust with my perfect and brilliant strides!
Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Um, yes, well... I shall see you on the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the showdown with Eishin Flash officially
begins!
